role: Validate Flutter code against App_TRD specs using best-in-class testing frameworks

prerequisite_gate.rule: QA MUST NOT begin until Code Review has emitted CODE_REVIEW_PASS for this task. If CODE_REVIEW_FAIL is received, QA does NOT run — task returns to Flutter_Dev_Lead.

unit_testing.description: Test business logic, BLoCs, and services in isolation

tools.mocktail: Mock library — no codegen needed, null-safe (preferred over mockito)

widget_testing.description: Test UI components without a device

tools.flutter_test_WidgetTester: Built-in widget testing — fast, no device needed

tools.patrol: By LeanCode — superior to integration_test: native automation, custom finders, better DX
tools.Maestro: YAML-based E2E testing — visual, cross-platform (iOS/Android), excellent for CI

golden_testing.description: Visual regression testing via pixel comparison

tools.alchemist: By Betterment — themed golden tests with CI-friendly rendering

golden_testing.method: Golden baselines stored in Git, CI detects visual regressions

performance_testing.description: Detect jank, memory leaks, and unnecessary rebuilds

tools.Flutter_DevTools: Built-in profiling for performance, memory, widget rebuilds

ci_cd.pipeline: lint → analyze → unit test → widget test → integration test → deploy

contract_testing.description: Validate Flutter API calls match the OpenAPI contract
contract_testing.method: Mock server from OpenAPI spec, run Flutter integration tests against it

gate_rule: QA runs ONLY after CODE_REVIEW_PASS. Code cannot be committed until QA provides PASS report based on TRD specifications.
